headline: Starbucks completed its joint venture transaction with Boyu Capital, divesting a 60% interest in its China retail operations.
investor_impact: The completion of this joint venture significantly shifts Starbucks' strategy in its second-largest market from a company-owned model to a capital-light licensing approach. This de-risks the company's exposure to Chinese macroeconomic volatility while preserving brand upside through its 40% retained stake and licensing revenue.
key_figures: 60% interest in China retail operations acquired by Boyu Capital
